sourceDesc.p: Derived from CDSL MW, PWG, and PWK source records for interoperability analysis.

projectDesc.p: tei-archival-profile-v0.1; TEI is used as the archival/textual model. Raw CDSL records are preserved as escaped source-entry quotes, while selected lexical structures are promoted into TEI entry, form, sense, citation, and relation elements.

revisionDesc.change: Included in the full machine-reviewed TEI profile.

listBibl.head: Machine-extracted citation index; source quotes preserve the archival text.

cit.quote:
<L>181121<pc>895,1<k1>laNG<k2>laNG<e>1
<s>laNG</s> ¦ (<ab>cf.</ab> √ <s>raMh</s> and <s>laGu</s>) <ab>cl.</ab> 1. <ab>P.</ab> <ab>Ā.</ab> (<ls>Dhātup. iv, 34</ls>; <ls n="Dhātup.">v, 55</ls>) <s>laNGati</s>, <s>˚te</s> (<ab>Gr.</ab> also <s>lalaNGa</s>, <s>˚Ge</s>; <ab>aor.</ab> <s>alaNGIt</s>, <s>˚Gizwa</s>; <ab>fut.</ab> <s>laNGitA</s>; <s>˚Gizyati</s>, <s>˚te</s>; <ab>inf.</ab> <s>laNGitum</s>),
<div n="to"/>to leap over, go beyond (<ab>Ā.</ab>), <ls>Pañcad.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to ascend, mount upon (<ab>P.</ab>), <ls>Bhaṭṭ.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to pass over meals, abstain from food, fast (<ab>P.</ab>), <ls>Dhātup.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to dry, dry up, waste, consume, <ls>L.</ls> :
<div n="vp"/><ab>Caus.</ab> or <ab>cl.</ab> 10. <ab>P.</ab> (<ls>Dhātup. xxxiii, 87</ls>; <ls n="Dhātup. xxxiii,">121</ls>) <s>laNGayati</s> (<ab>mc.</ab> also, <ls>A.</ls> <s>˚te</s>; <ab>Pass.</ab> <s>laNGyate</s>),
<div n="to"/>to leap over, cross, traverse, <ls>Mn.</ls>; <ls>MBh.</ls> &c.;
<div n="to"/>to mount, ascend, tread upon, enter, <ls>Kāv.</ls>; <ls>Kathās.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to overstep, transgress, violate, neglect, <ls>Yājñ.</ls>; <ls>Kāv.</ls>; <ls>Rājat.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to get over, avoid, shun, escape from, <ls>Kāv.</ls>; <ls>Kathās.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to frustrate, prevent, avert, <ls>R.</ls>; <ls>Mṛcch.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to disregard, slight, offend, insult, injure, <ls>Mn.</ls>; <ls>MBh.</ls> &c.;
<div n="to"/>to excel, surpass, outshine, obscure, eclipse, <ls>R.</ls>; <ls>Ragh.</ls>; <ls>Rājat.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to remove, transport, <ls>Kāraṇḍ.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to cause to pass over meals <ab>i.e.</ab> fast, <ls>Suśr.</ls> :
<div n="vp"/><ab>Desid.</ab> of <ab>Caus.</ab> <s>lilaNGayizati</s>, to intend to step over, <ls>Kāvyād.</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab><info westergaard="laGi,4.34,01.0077;laGi,5.55,01.xxxx;laGi,33.87,10.0195;laGi,33.121,10.0196"/><info whitneyroots="laNG,145"/><info verb="genuineroot" cp="1P,1Ā,10P"/>
<LEND>

<L>85874<pc>6-0486<k1>laNG<k2>laNG
{#laNG#}¦, {#la/NGati, ˚te#}
<ls>DHĀTUP. 4,34</ls> ({#gatO, BojananivfttO#}).
<ls n="DHĀTUP.">5,55</ls> ({#SozaRe, gatO#}).
<div n="1"> 1) {%springen auf%}: {#anye cAlaNGizuH SElAn#}
<ls>BHAṬṬ. 15,32.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%fasten.%}
<div n="1">— 3) {%abzehren%}: {#yaM vyADiratidIptANgaM kadAcittu na laNGati#}
<ls>HALĀY.</ls> im <ls>ŚKDR.</ls>
<div n="p">— <ab>caus.</ab> {#laNGa/yati#}
<ls>DHĀTUP. 33,87.</ls> <ls n="DHĀTUP. 33,">121.</ls> ({#BAzArTa, BAsArTa#}). aus metrischen Rücksichten hier und da auch <ab>med.</ab>
<div n="1"> 1) {%springen über, überschreiten. hinübergehen über%}; mit <ab>acc.</ab>: {#vatsatantrIm#}
<ls>M. 4,38.</ls> {#laNGayitvA prayAhi mAm#}
<ls>MBH. 3,11173. fg.</ls> {#sAgaraH plavagendreRa krameREkena laNGitaH#}
<ls n="MBH. 3,">11178.</ls> {#prAkAram#}
<ls n="MBH.">4,811.</ls> <ls n="MBH.">13,1575.</ls> {#saritaH#}
<ls n="MBH. 3,">7381.</ls> <ls>HARIV. 3747.</ls> <ls n="HARIV.">4282.</ls> {#velAM na laNGayati#} das Meer
<ls>R. GORR. 2,11,5.</ls> <ls n="R. GORR.">4,63,16.</ls> <ls n="R. GORR.">5,1,19.</ls> <ls n="R. GORR. 5,1,">28.</ls> <ls n="R. GORR. 5,">2,43.</ls> <ls n="R. GORR. 5,">3,7.</ls> <ls n="R. GORR. 5,">6,3.</ls> <ls n="R. GORR. 5,">55,16.</ls> <ls n="R. GORR.">7,27,1.</ls> <ls>MEGH. 55.</ls> <ls>RAGH. 4,52.</ls> <ls>Spr. 1239.</ls> <ls n="Spr.">1519.</ls> <ls>VARĀH. BṚH. S. 53,108.</ls> <ls>RĀJA-TAR. 3,325.</ls> <ls n="RĀJA-TAR.">4,566.</ls> <ls>MĀRK. P. 35,30.</ls> <ls n="MĀRK. P.">50,88.</ls> <ls n="MĀRK. P.">51,90.</ls> {#kalpAntavAtasaMkzoBalaNGitASezaBUBftaH#} ({#udaDeH#})
<ls>PRAB. 5,1. 92,15.</ls> <ls>Verz. d. Oxf. H. 33,a,4. 6.</ls> {#aDvAnam#} {%einen Weg zurücklegen%}
<ls>RAGH. 1,47.</ls> {#maryAdAm#} {%die Grenze überschreiten%}
<ls>MBH. 12,3565.</ls>
<ls>HARIV. 14324.</ls>
<ls>R. 7,36,32.</ls>
<ls>Spr. 4201.</ls>
<ls>BHĀG. P. 1,18,37.</ls> {#sTitim#}
<ls>KATHĀS. 45,91.</ls>
<ls>R. GORR. 2,121,17.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%besteigen. hinüberfahren über, von oben berühren%}: {#durgAlaNGitavigraha#} ({#umAvallaBa#})
<ls>SĀH. D. 18,20.</ls> {#hasta iva BUtimalino yaTA yaTA laNGayati — darpaRam#}
<ls>Spr. 5397.</ls> {#kakzAgnilaNGitataru#}
<ls>RAGH. 11,92.</ls> {#nivAsaScEza me 'SvatTo devErapi na laNGyate#} so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%wird betreten%}
<ls>KATHĀS. 94,71.</ls> {#yAvadrUpaM Jawiti na jarayA laNGyate#}
(<ab>v. l.</ab> für {#lupyate#}) {#preyasInAm#}
<ls>Spr. 2601.</ls>
<ls>PRAB. 1,10.</ls>
<div n="1">— 3) {%übertreten, verletzen, zuwiderhandeln%}: {#saMvidam#}
<ls>YĀJÑ. 2,187.</ls> {#nideSam#}
<ls>RAGH. 9,9.</ls> {#AdeSam#}
<ls>KATHĀS. 33,45.</ls> {#AjYAm#}
<ls n="KATHĀS.">51,43.</ls> <ls>RĀJA-TAR. 4,312.</ls> {#mantrimantram#}
[Page6-0487]
<ls>KATHĀS. 58,53.</ls> {#vacaH#}
<ls n="KATHĀS.">49,16.</ls> {#guruvAkyam#}
<ls>Spr. 4090.</ls> {#SAstrARi#}
<ls>MĀRK. P. 50,88.</ls>
<div n="1">— 4) {%hinüberkommen über, entgehen%}: {#niyatiH kena laNGyate#}
<ls>Spr. 2011.</ls> {#prAkkftaM kena laNGyate#}
<ls n="Spr.">2169.</ls> {#BAgyaM na laNGayati ko 'pi viDipraRItam#}
<ls n="Spr.">3655.</ls> {#dEvaliKitaM Bogam#}
<ls>KATHĀS. 40,31.</ls> {#Sirasi liKitam#}
<ls>Spr. 4147.</ls> {#prajApativaram#} so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%hintertreiben, vereiteln, hemmen%}
<ls>R. 7,23,5,58.</ls> {#dEvI ca sidDirapi laNGayituM na SakyA#}
<ls>MṚCCH. 98,13.</ls>
<ls>Spr. 1900.</ls>
<div n="1">— 5) {%sich über Jmd hinwegsetzen%} so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%gegen Jmdes Willen handeln, sich vergehen gegen Jmd, beleidigen, verletzen%}
<ls>M. 5,151.</ls> <ls n="M.">8,371.</ls>
<ls>MBH. 1,1445</ls> {#lambayitvA#} <ab>ed.</ab> (Bomb.).
<ls>HARIV. 571</ls> ({#tarjitA#} <ab>st.</ab> {#laNGitA#} die neuere <ab>Ausg.</ab>).
<ls>Spr. 5397.</ls> {#rajasA alaNGitAtmA#} {%der sich nicht in der Leidenschaft vergessen hat%}
<ls>KATHĀS. 20,128.</ls> {#raviRA laNGito mAsaH#}
<ls>WEBER, JYOT. 101.</ls>
<div n="1">— 6) {%Jmd übertreffen%}: {#guRErOdAryAdyErmaGavAnamalaNGayat#}
<ls>RĀJA-TAR. 4,217.</ls> {%Etwas übertreffen, verdunkeln%}: {#DarzaRAmarzito rAmo DEryaM rozeRa laNGayan#}
<ls>R. 6,90,12.</ls> ({#yaSaH#}) {#jagatprakASaM tadaSezamijyayA BavadgururlaNGayituM mamodyataH#}
<ls>RAGH. 3,48.</ls>
<div n="1">— 7) {%Jmd fasten%} (Essenszeiten {%übergehen%}) {%lassen%}
<ls>SUŚR. 2,407,12. 462,11.</ls> {#sulaNGita#} {%den man hat richtig fasten lassen%}
<ls n="SUŚR.">407,17.</ls>
<div n="v">— <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#laNGana#} <ab>fgg.</ab>
<div n="p">— <ab>desid.</ab> vom <ab>caus.</ab> {%zu überschreiten gedenken%}: {#meruM lilaNGayizati#} <ab>Cit.</ab> im <ab>Comm.</ab> zu <ls>KĀVYĀD. 2,350.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#ati#} <ab>caus.</ab> {%übertreten, verletzen%}: {#AjYAm#}
<ls>KATHĀS. 18,37.</ls>
<ls>PRAB. 7,16</ls> ({#aBilaNGya#}
<ab>v. l.</ab>).
<div n="v">— <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#atilaNGana, atilaNGin#} .
<div n="p">— {#aBi#} <ab>caus.</ab>
<div n="1"> 1) {%springen über, überschreiten%}: {#agnim#}
<ls>M. 4,54.</ls>
<ls>YĀJÑ. 1,137.</ls> {#maryAdAm#}
<ls>MBH. 12,5455.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%übertreten, verletzen%}: {#Darmam#}
<ls>MBH. 12,5319.</ls> {#AjYAm#}
<ls>PRAB. 7,16.</ls>
<div n="1">— 3) {%sich vergehen gegen Jmd%}: {#brahmARam#}
<ls>MBH. 12,3565.</ls>
<div n="v">— <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#aBilaNGana#} .
<div n="p">— {#ava#} <ab>caus.</ab> {%hinwegkommen über%} (eine Zeit), {%verbringen%}: {#avahelAvalaNGite . grIzme#}
<ls>KATHĀS. 78,22.</ls> {#sarvakAlamavalaNGya#} so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%keine Zeit eingehalten habend%}
<ls>GHAṬ. 7.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#ud#} <ab>caus.</ab>
<div n="1"> 1) {%überschreiten, hinübergehen über, passiren%}: {#kAverIm#}
<ls>KATHĀS. 19,95.</ls> {#parvatam#}

<ls n="KATHĀS.">100,11.</ls> <ls n="KATHĀS.">103,1.</ls> <ls n="KATHĀS.">109,41.</ls> <ls n="KATHĀS. 109,">44.</ls> <ls n="KATHĀS.">116,14.</ls> <ls>RĀJA-TAR. 3,221.</ls> {#Bittim#}
<ls>Verz. d. Oxf. H. 128,b,12.</ls> {#AkASamapAram#}
<ls n="Verz. d. Oxf. H.">148,a, No. 318, Z. 8.</ls> {#deSAn#}
<ls>KATHĀS. 25,38.</ls> <ls n="KATHĀS.">67,106.</ls> <ls n="KATHĀS.">25,10.</ls>
<ls>RĀJA-TAR. 4,146.</ls> {#aDvAnam#} {%einen Weg zurücklegen%}
<ls>MEG. 46.</ls> <ls>KATHĀS. 86,55.</ls> <ls n="KATHĀS.">111,42.</ls> über eine Zeit {%hinwegkommen%}, eine Zeit {%zubringen, verleben%}
<ls n="KATHĀS.">67,106.</ls> <ls n="KATHĀS.">72,407.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%sich schwingen auf, zu sitzen kommen auf%}: {#uquyena SaMBoralaNGyamullaNGitamuttamANgam#}
<ls>Spr. 4023.</ls>
<div n="1">— 3) {%übertreten, verletzen, zuwiderhandeln%}: {#svakaM Darmam#}
<ls>MĀRK. P. 28,34.</ls> <ls n="MĀRK. P.">132,12.</ls>
<ls>DAŚAK.</ls> in <ls>BENF. Chr. 181,4.</ls> {#AjYAvacanam#}
<ls>KATHĀS. 39,99.</ls> {#AjYAm#}
<ls>RĀJA-TAR. 3,80.</ls> <ls n="RĀJA-TAR.">4,218.</ls> <ls n="RĀJA-TAR. 4,">378.</ls> <ls n="RĀJA-TAR.">5,395.</ls>
<ls>MĀRK. P. 114,21.</ls> {#samayam#}
<ls>KATHĀS. 108,183.</ls> {#nItim#}
<ls n="KATHĀS. 108,">190.</ls> {#satyAmimAM giram#}
<ls n="KATHĀS.">84,51.</ls> {#SAsanam#}
<ls n="KATHĀS.">56,162.</ls> <ls>BHĀG. P. 5,26,6.</ls> <ls n="BHĀG. P.">12,1,9.</ls> {#SAstram#}
<ls n="BHĀG. P.">6,1,67.</ls> {#satpaTam#} {%den Weg der Guten verlassen%}
<ls n="BHĀG. P.">6,7,2.</ls>
<div n="1">— 4) {%hinüberkommen über, entgehen%}: {#ko hi svaSirasaSCAyAM viDeScollaNGayedgatim#}
<ls>KATHĀS. 52,211.</ls> {#prAktanam#}
<ls>PAÑCAR. 1,3,10.</ls>
<div n="1">— 5) {%sich vergehen gegen Jmd, beleidigen%}
<ls>DAŚAK.</ls> in <ls>BENF. Chr. 191,20. fg.</ls> <ab>Comm.</ab> zu <ls>VĀSAVAD. 7,1.</ls>
<div n="v">— <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#ullaNGana#} <ab>fg.</ab>
<div n="p">— {#samud#} <ab>caus.</ab> {%übertreten, verletzen, vernachlässigen%}: {#sadAcAram#}
<ls>MĀRK. P. 34,7.</ls> {#nityanEmittikIH kriyAH#} 3.
<div n="p">— {#pari#} <ab>caus.</ab> {%abspringen von, verlassen%} (einen Weg): {#nItimArgam#}
<ls>Spr. 2718.</ls>
[Page6-0488]
<div n="v">— <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#parilaNGana#} .
<div n="p">— {#prati#} <ab>caus.</ab>
<div n="1"> 1) {%sich schwingen —, sich setzen auf%}: {#AsanAdIni saMvIkzya pratilaNGya ca yatnataH#}
<ls>SARVADARŚANAS. 39,10.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%übertreten, verletzen%}: {#Darmam#}
<ls>MBH. 12,9576.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#vi#} {%springen%}: {#sAkaM BekErvilaNGantaH#}
<ls>BHĀG. P. 10,12,10.</ls> {#itastato vilaNGadBirgovatsEH#}
<ls n="BHĀG. P. 10,">46,10.</ls> — {#avilaMDase#}
<ls>Verz. d. Oxf. H. 76,b, N. 2</ls> wohl fehlerhaft für {#avilambitam#} . — <ab>caus.</ab>
<div n="1"> 1) {%springen über, überschreiten, hinübergehen über, passiren%}: {#prAkAram#}
<ls>KATHĀS. 75,120.</ls> {#payoniDim#}
<ls n="KATHĀS.">69,182.</ls> {#vinDyam#}
<ls>RAGH. 16,32.</ls>
<ls>RĀJA-TAR. 6,2.</ls>
<ls>BHĀG. P. 11,4,10.</ls>
<ls>PAÑCAR. 1,7,12.</ls> {#aDvAnam#} {%einen Weg zurücklegen%}
<ls>RAGH. 5,42.</ls> {#gavyUtim#}
<ls>RĀJA-TAR. 2,163.</ls> eine Zeit {%überspringen, nicht einhalten%}: {#samayam#}
<ls>KUMĀRAS. 3,25.</ls> {#vilaNGayitvA#} so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%gewartet habend%}
<ls>MBH. 12,4792.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%sich erheben zu, gen%}: {#naBaH#}
<ls>Spr. 1756.</ls>
<ls>KIR. 5,1.</ls> {#vilaNGitAkASa#} ({#himAcala#})
<ls>RĀJA-TAR. 3,225.</ls>
<div n="1">— 3) {%übertreten, verletzen, zuwiderhandeln%}: {#AjYAm#}
<ls>KATHĀS. 18,33.</ls>
<ls>RAGH. 9,74.</ls>
<div n="1">— 4) {%hinüberkommen über%} so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%überwinden%}: {#Apadam#}
<ls>KATHĀS. 18,309.</ls> {#dEvam#}
<ls>Spr. 471</ls>, <ab>v. l.</ab> so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%vereiteln%}: {#vilaNGitADoraRatIvrayatnAH senAgajendrAH#}
<ls>RAGH. 5,48.</ls>
<div n="1">— 5) {%übergehen, bei Seite lassen, aufgeben%}: {#anyarasAn#}
<ls>RAGH. 3,4.</ls> {#lajjAm#}
<ls>KATHĀS. 32,196.</ls>
<div n="1">— 6) {%übertreffen%}: {#karRotpalaM prAyastava dfzwyA vilaNGyate#}
<ls>KĀVYĀD. 2,224.</ls>
<div n="1">— 7) {%sich vergehen gegen Jmd, beleidigen%}
<ls>Spr. 4700.</ls>
<div n="1">— 8) {%fasten lassen%}
<ls>SUŚR. 2,486,12.</ls>
<div n="v">— <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#vilaNGana#} <ab>fgg.</ab>
<div n="p">— {#ativi#} <ab>caus.</ab> {%vorübergehen bei Jmd, bei Seite lassen, nicht einkehren bei%}
<ls>BHĀG. P. 10,31,16.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#saMvi#} <ab>caus.</ab> {%bei Seite liegen lassen, vernachlässigen, unterlassen%}: {#viDim#}
<ls>PAÑCAR. 3,7,19.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#sam#}, {#saMlaNGitA rAtriH#} {%vorübergegangen%}
<ls>LĀṬY. 6,6,15.</ls>

<L>95602<pc>5-214-b<k1>laNG<k2>laNG √{#laNG#}¦, {#laNGuti#}, {#˚te#} <div n="1">— 1〉 <ab>Med.</ab> {%überschreiten, hinübergehen über%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>) <ls>PAÑCAD.</ls> <div n="1">— 2〉 <ab>Act.</ab> {%springen auf%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>) <ls>BHAṬṬ.</ls> <div n="1">— 3〉 <ab>Act.</ab> *{%fasten%}. <div n="1">— 4〉 <ab>Act.</ab> {%abzehren%}. <div n="m">— <ab>Caus.</ab> {#laNGayati#}, {#˚te#} (metrisch), {#laNGita#} <ab>Partic.</ab> <div n="1">— 1〉 {%springen über, überschreiten, hinübergehen über;%} mit <ab>Acc.</ab> {#maryAdAm#}, {#sTitim#} {%die Grenzen überschreiten;%} {#aDvAnam#} {%einen Weg zurücklegen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%besteigen, betreten, hinüberfahren über, von oben berühren%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%übertreten, verletzen, zuwiderhandeln%}. <div n="1">— 4〉 {%hinüberkommen über, entgehen%}. <div n="1">— 5〉 {%hintertreiben, vereiteln, hemmen%}. <div n="1">— 6〉 {%sich über Jmd hinwegsetzen,%} so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%gegen Jmds Willen handeln, sich vergehen gegen Jmd, beleidigen, verletzen%}. <div n="1">— 7〉 {%Jmd übertreffen%}. <div n="1">— 8〉 {%Etwas übertreffen, verdunkeln%}. <div n="1">— 9〉 {%fortschaffen, transportiren%} <ls>KĀRAṆḌ. 71,8</ls>. <div n="1">— 10〉 {%Jmd fasten%} (Essenszeiten {%übergehen%}) {%lassen%}. {#laNGita#} <ls>CARAKA. 6,3</ls>. <div n="m">— <ab>Desid.</ab> vom <ab>Caus.</ab> {#lilaNGiyizati#} {%zu überschreiten gedenken%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#ati#} <ab>Caus.</ab> {%übertreten, verletzen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#aBi#} <ab>Caus.</ab> <div n="1">— 1〉 {%springen über, überschreiten%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%übertreten, verletzen%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%sich vergehen gegen Jmd%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>). <div n="p">— Mit {#ava#} <ab>Caus.</ab> {%hinwegkommen über%} (eine Zeit), {%verbringen%}. {#sarvakAlamavalaNGya#} so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%keine Zeit eingehalten habend%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#A#} <ab>Caus.</ab> {#AlaNGita#}. {%besetzt mit%} (im <ab>Comp.</ab> vorangehend) <ls>VIDDH. 18,6</ls>. <div n="p">— Mit {#ud#} <ab>Caus.</ab> <div n="1">— 1〉 {%überschreiten, hinübergehen [Page5-214-c] über, passiren%}. {#aDvAnam#} {%einen Weg zurücklegen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 über eine Zeit {%hinwegkommen,%} eine Zeit {%zubringen, verleben%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%sich schwingen —, zu sitzen kommen auf%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>). <div n="1">— 4〉 {%übertreten, verletzen, zuwiderhandeln%} <ls>CAMPAKA. 34</ls>. {#satpaTam#} {%den Weg der Guten verlassen%}. <div n="1">— 5〉 {%hinüberkommen über, entgehen%}. <div n="1">— 6〉 {%sich vergegen gegen Jmd, beleidigen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#samud#} <ab>Caus.</ab> <div n="1">— 1〉 {%übertreten, verletzen, vernachlässigen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%hinüberbringen, hinüberschaffen%} <ls>HARṢAC. 181,20</ls>. <div n="p">— Mit {#pari#} <ab>Caus.</ab> {%abspringen von, verlassen%} (einen Weg). <div n="p">— Mit {#prati#} <ab>Caus.</ab> <div n="1">— 1〉 {%sich schwingen —, sich setzen auf%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>). <div n="1">— 2〉 {%übertreten, verletzen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#vi#} {%springen, sich erheben zu%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>) {#vyalaGizus#} <ls>ŚIŚ. 17,55</ls>. — {#avilaMGase#} <ls>Verz. d. Oxf. H. 76,b, N. 2</ls>. wohl fehlerhaft für {#avilambitam#}. <div n="m">— <ab>Caus.</ab> <div n="1">— 1〉 {%springen über, überschreiten, hinübergehen über, passiren%}. {#aDvAnam#} {%einen Weg zurücklegen%} <ls n="Chr.">311,10</ls>. {#sTitim#} {%die Grenzen überschreiten%} <ls>ŚIŚ. 17,12</ls>. <div n="1">— 2〉 eine Zeit {%überspringen, nicht einhalten%}. {#vilaNGayitvA#} so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%gewartet habend%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%sich erheben zu oder gen%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>). <div n="1">— 4〉 {%sich%} einer Sache (<ab>Acc.</ab>) {%entziehen, nicht Folge leisten%} <ls n="Chr.">213,29</ls>. <div n="1">— 5〉 {%übertreten, verletzen, zuwiderhandeln%}. <div n="1">— 6〉 {%hinüberkommen über,%} so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%überwinden%}. <div n="1">— 7〉 {%vereiteln%}. <div n="1">— 8〉 {%übergehen, bei Seite lassen%}. <div n="1">— 9〉 {%übertreffen%}. <div n="1">— 10〉 {%sich vergehen gegen Jmd, beleidigen%}. <div n="1">— 11〉 {%fasten lassen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#ativi#} <ab>Caus.</ab> {%vorübergehen bei Jmd, Jmd bei Seite lassen, nicht einkehren bei%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#saMvi#} <ab>Caus.</ab> {%bei Seite liegen lassen, vernachlässigen, unterlassen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#sam#}, {#saMlaNGita#} {%vorübergegangen%} (Nacht). <LEND>
